title: Mystical Wood
description: Adds Another Wood with Extreme Enchantability
body:
[![fabric](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/supported/fabric_vector.svg)](https://fabricmc.net/use/installer/) [![fabric-api](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/requires/fabric-api_vector.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) [![github](https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/@intergrav/devins-badges@3/assets/cozy/available/github_vector.svg)](https://github.com/BoyPika/MysticalWood)
[![fstats](https://images-cxe.pages.dev/fstats.svg)](https://modrinth.com/mod/fstats)

This mod simply adds a new type of wood. Use the wood to create tools with a higher enchantability than even gold has in vanilla, which means it's insanly easy to get crazy enchants at an enchantment table. You can also use the wood to make stairs and slabs if you want.

## How to Create Tools
In order to create the tools you need to combine any vanilla tool with the Mythical Upgrade Template and a Mystical Log. It's also possible to upgrade mystical diamond tools to mystical netherite tools.

### Mystical Upgrade Template Recipe
![8 Mystical Logs surrounding an emerald to create a mystical upgrade template](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2050cde3884779b655045fc062ebd49541ef6d19.png)
### Example Tool Recipe
![Smithing Table with Slots filled with a Mystical Upgrade Template, a Netherite Axe, and a Mystical Log](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8b2b8deec2c14735d881b813045846b39dd8689a.png)
### Upgrading Mystical Diamond Tools
![Smithing Table with Slots filled with a Netherite Upgrade Template, a Mystical Diamond Axe, and a Netherite Ingot](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/6b6b90bc84ef80cddfb5a21c6f664296dad21e4f.png)
